nasb.text: Then you will know that I am the Lord, when I have opened your graves and caused you to come up out of your graves, My people.

esv.text: And you shall know that I am the Lord, when I open your graves, and raise you from your graves, O my people.

cnv.text: 我的子民哪！我打開你們的墳墓，把你們從墳墓中領上來的時候，你們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我的子民啊，当我这样做的时候，你们就知道我是耶和华。
